summary: Iteration 56: Pvt Paddy Payment Fix - All 14 backend tests PASSED. Bug fixed: Pvt paddy payments (via ₹ button) now create cash book entries with correct party name (e.g., 'Amit - Kullu') and party_type='Pvt Paddy Purchase' instead of generic 'Pvt Paddy Payment' category and empty party_type.

issues: Console 404 errors for backup endpoints (expected on web version, no impact)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend private_trading.py line 329-350: create_private_payment correctly builds party_label from party_name + mandi_name
Backend private_trading.py line 336-342: Cash book entry created with category=party_label, party_type='Pvt Paddy Purchase'
Backend private_trading.py line 344-350: Ledger entry also created with same correct party info
Backend private_trading.py line 407-456: fix_old_payment_cashbook_entries migration endpoint successfully fixed 4 old entries
Frontend PrivateTrading.jsx: 3 tabs (Paddy Purchase, Rice Sale, Party Summary) all functional
Frontend cashbook/PartySummaryTab.jsx: Beautified UI with icons, badges, and proper party_type display

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tabs and flows working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test created dynamic TEST_PVT_PAY_ prefixed entries with auto-cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pvt paddy payment bug is FIXED. When making payments via ₹ button on Private Trading > Paddy Purchase, cash book entries now have: category='PartyName - MandiName', party_type='Pvt Paddy Purchase'. No generic 'Pvt Paddy Payment' category entries exist. Cash Book Party Summary shows 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' badge with pink styling. Amit - Kullu is correctly labeled.

payment_creates_ledger_entry.creates: cash_transactions (account=ledger) with same correct party info

no_generic_pvt_paddy_payment_category.verification: No entries found with category='Pvt Paddy Payment' - all have proper party names

pvt_trading_party_summary_loads_data.shows: Amit party with Mandi=Kullu, Purchase=Rs.789,837, Balance=Rs.0

pvt_trading_party_click_navigates_to_cas.behavior: Clicking party row shows toast and navigates to Cash Book/Ledgers

pvt_trading_page.paddy_purchase_tab: PASSED - Shows Amit entry with Rs.789,837
pvt_trading_page.party_summary_tab: PASSED - Shows Amit with Kullu, all balances
